info.value: It is Saturday morning. The weather is fine. Mr. and Mrs. Green are at home with their two children. Their son Jim, and their daughter Kate, are playing chess in the garden. They are very happy. Mr. Green is reading a newspaper in the living room. Where is Mrs. Green? She is in the kitchen. She is cooking lunch for her family. The family really enjoy being together.
